source.title: AI Governance in Higher Education: The 2026 Framework for Policy & Risk

verified_claims: 80% of university faculty/staff use AI tools
Only 20-25% of universities have formal AI policies
EU AI Act high-risk provisions take effect August 2026
Shadow AI adoption is widespread in institutions
Washington University launched +AI initiative in March 2026
Requirements: transparency, bias testing, human-in-the-loop governance
issues: Source article does not explicitly state August 2026 as deadline (inferred from EU AI Act timeline)
fact_check.methodology: Cross-referenced with EDUCAUSE 2024 AI Landscape Study, Washington University press releases, and EU AI Act official documentation.

draft.headline: 대학 캠퍼스의 'AI 거버넌스' 위기…8월 규제 시한 앞두고 정책 공백 노출
draft.subheadline: 교직원 80% AI 사용하지만 정책은 25% 미만, EU 규제 시행까지 6개월 남겨
